prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年物理类最低位次约 14878→17815→16787→18279→28527，整体呈后移趋势，近 3 年累计后移约 11740 名；2025 年位次异常大幅后移，主要受小学教育（师范）等冷门专业拉低，基准约 28527 名；本省物理类计划 2021–2025 年分别为 108→108→112→123→131 人，持续小幅扩招；2026 年计划 139 人，较 2025 年再扩招 8 人（+6.1%），扩招使竞争略有缓解，但幅度有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主榜排名持续上升，2021 年第 65 名→2026 年第 52 名，近年排名稳步提升，学校综合实力和认可度增强；2023 年声誉评价偏负面（学校管理事件），但近年未见明显负面舆情；抖音热度排名第 71（一般），短视频曝光量中等，未出现高热关注或断档信号；轻工技术与工程 A+、食品科学与工程 A+，均为全国顶尖水平，与该校食品、轻化、生物工程等招生专业高度关联，对相关专业报考有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工 科专业社会热度持续高热推荐；食品科学与工程、生物工程等专业热度一般；本省 2026 年物理类考生约 347000 人，较 2025 年 320192 人增加约 8.4%，竞争加剧，2025 年物理类本科批 405 分，近年呈下降趋势；江南大学位于江苏无锡，属长三角经济发达地区，对湖南考生有一定地域吸引力；该校在湖南招生占比约 2.5%（2024 年数据），非本地生源主力省份，跨省报考热度平稳。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年位次异常后移（受冷门专业拉低）、2026 年扩招 6.1%、物理类考生增加 8.4%、学校软科排名持续上升至第 52 名等因素，预计 2026 年物理类最低位次将在回调 2025 年异常的基础上小幅后移；预测最低位次约 27772 名，区间 27272–28272 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 14878→17815→16787→18279→28527, showing an overall backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 11740 places in the last 3 years; the 2025 ranking experienced an abnormal large backward shift, mainly due to unpopular majors such as Primary Education (Teacher Training), with a baseline of about 28527; the provincial Physics Category enrollment plan from 2021 to 2025 was 108→108→112→123→131 students respectively, with continuous small expansion; the 2026 plan is 139 students, an increase of 8 students (+6.1%) compared to 2025, which slightly eases competition but to a limited extent.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; the Soft Science main ranking has been rising continuously, from 65th in 2021 to 52nd in 2026, with steady improvement in recent years, enhancing the school's comprehensive strength and recognition; the 2023 reputation evaluation was somewhat negative (school management incident), but no significant negative public opinion has been seen in recent years; Douyin popularity ranking is 71st (average), with moderate short video exposure, no high attention or cutoff signal; Light Industry Technology and Engineering A+, Food Science and Engineering A+, both at the national top level, highly related to the school's enrollment majors such as food, light chemical, and bioengineering, providing strong appeal for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and other engineering majors continue to be highly recommended; Food Science and Engineering, Bioengineering and other majors have average popularity; the number of Physics Category examinees in the province in 2026 is about 347,000, an increase of about 8.4% compared to 320,192 in 2025, intensifying competition; the 2025 Physics Category undergraduate batch score is 405 points, showing a downward trend in recent years; Jiangnan University is located in Wuxi, Jiangsu, a developed area in the Yangtze River Delta, with some regional appeal to Hunan examinees; the school's enrollment proportion in Hunan is about 2.5% (2024 data), not a main source province for students, with stable cross-province application popularity.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the abnormal backward shift in 2025 ranking (pulled down by unpopular majors), the 6.1% enrollment expansion in 2026, the 8.4% increase in Physics Category examinees, and the continuous rise of the school's Soft Science ranking to 52nd, it is expected that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will slightly shift backward based on the correction of the 2025 anomaly; the predicted minimum ranking is about 27772, with a range of 27272–28272.

When the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range, focus on aiming for Tier 1 flagship majors.
